name: General Service Agreement
description: A foundational contract establishing the terms, scope, and compensation for services provided between two parties.
content:
GENERAL SERVICE AGREEMENT

This General Service Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between the Service Provider and the Client named below.

1. THE PARTIES

Service Provider:
Name/Company: {{provider_name}}
Address: {{provider_address}}
Tax ID / Reg No: {{provider_tax_id}}

Client:
Name/Company: {{client_name}}
Address: {{client_address}}
Tax ID / Reg No: {{client_tax_id}}

2. SCOPE OF SERVICES

The Service Provider agrees to provide the following services (the "Services") to the Client in accordance with the terms of this Agreement:

{{service_description}}

3. TERM AND TERMINATION

{{#if (eq term_type 'Fixed Term')}}

This Agreement shall commence on {{formatDate start_date}} and shall continue in full force until {{formatDate end_date}}, unless earlier terminated by mutual agreement or for cause.

{{else}}

This Agreement shall commence on {{formatDate start_date}} and will continue on an ongoing basis. Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time by providing {{notice_period_days}} days written notice to the other party.

{{/if}}

4. COMPENSATION AND PAYMENT

In consideration for the Services, the Client agrees to pay the Service Provider the total sum of {{total_fee}} (excluding applicable taxes).

Payment shall be made according to the following schedule/terms:

{{payment_terms}}

5. OBLIGATIONS AND WARRANTIES

The Service Provider warrants that the Services will be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner, consistent with industry standards. The Client agrees to provide timely access to any materials or information reasonably required for the Service Provider to perform the Services.

6. CONFIDENTIALITY

{{#if (eq include_confidentiality 'Yes')}}

Both parties agree to hold in strict confidence any proprietary or confidential information disclosed by the other party during the term of this Agreement, and shall not use such information for any purpose outside the scope of this Agreement.

{{else}}

No specific confidentiality clauses are attached to this general agreement.

{{/if}}

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

Service Provider
{{provider_name}}
Signature: _________________________

Client
{{client_name}}
Signature: _________________________

fields.name: service_description
fields.label: Detailed Scope of Services
fields.placeholder: Describe exactly what services will be delivered.
